steps.title: Backsolve $\frac{3}{16}$
steps.content:
Backsolve $\frac{3}{16}$:
$$f\left(\frac{3}{16}\right)=\sqrt{5\cdot\frac{3}{16}+6}=\sqrt{\frac{15}{16}+6}=\sqrt{\frac{111}{16}}=\frac{\sqrt{111}}{4}\approx 2.63$$
$$-12\cdot\frac{3}{16}=-\frac{36}{16}=-\frac{9}{4}$$
Since the left-hand side is positive and the right-hand side is negative, they cannot be equal, so $\frac{3}{16}$ is not correct.

steps.title: Test $-\frac{3}{16}$
steps.content:
Test $-\frac{3}{16}$:
$$f\left(-\frac{3}{16}\right)=\sqrt{5\cdot\left(-\frac{3}{16}\right)+6}=\sqrt{-\frac{15}{16}+6}=\sqrt{\frac{81}{16}}=\frac{9}{4}$$
$$-12\cdot\left(-\frac{3}{16}\right)=\frac{36}{16}=\frac{9}{4}$$
Both sides equal $\frac{9}{4}$, so the equation holds.
That is the correct answer.
